name: knowledge_base_v1
description: adapterOS documentation-derived knowledge base: 1000 Q&A, troubleshooting, configuration, concept, and identity examples across all major subsystems.

entries.notes: Five subcategories: architecture_qa (200), troubleshooting_qa (200), configuration_qa (200), concept_definitions (200), identity_memorization (200)

architecture_qa.description: Technical Q&A about router, lifecycle, determinism, stacks, and policies

troubleshooting_qa.description: Diagnostic steps, causes, and fixes for common operational problems

configuration_qa.description: Config file location, parameter names, valid values, and examples

concept_definitions.description: Precise technical definitions with examples for core adapterOS concepts

identity_memorization.description: Verbatim facts: version numbers, policy names, role permissions, state machine transitions
